title: Maid to Order
writer: Doris Dembow, Grace Elliott, A.J.L. Parsons
actors: Julian Eltinge, Jane Reid, George E. Stone
plot: While trying to nab a gang of diamond smugglers, the police are notified by Scotland Yard that the gang's leader, a beautiful Englishwoman who was on her way to the States to take control of the gang, has been caught. Because the ...
